Zoning By-law Amendment application for the lands at 1-70 Eglinton Square, 1431 & 1437 Victoria Park Ave, 14, 18, 22 and 26 Engelhart Cres within the Golden Mile Secondary Plan Area to permit a mixed-use development. The application proposes six (6) tall buildings with building heights that range from 20 to 50 storeys and a six-storey mid-rise building. A total gross floor area of 318,654 sq. m (315,845 sq. m for residential uses and 2,809 sq. m for retail uses), 3,618 residential units and an FSI of 4.75 times the area of the lands are proposed. The existing three-storey residential buildings at 14, 18, 22 and 26 Engelhart Cres would be retained. The application is related to Official Plan Amendment application 16 230579 ESC 35 OZ (under appeal).

Site Plan Control application proposing 40-storey residential tower with a total gross floor area (GFA) of 31, 663.31 square metres resulting in a density of 11.3 floor space index (FSI). 477 residential units and 161 parking spaces are proposed.  See related Official Plan (OPA) and Zoning By-law (OZ) application no. 24 185909 NNY 08 OZ.

The purpose of this OPA is to permit a 0 metre north tower setback on 237 Victoria Street and a 30 metre height limit on 249 and 251-253 Victorira Street.  There is an exisitng OPA and ZBA application for 237 Victoria Street which is under appeal with the OLT (File No. 22 198781 STE 13 OZ). Specifically, this proposed OPA application, includes the lands at 249 and 251-253 Victoria Street in addition to 237 Victoria Street.

OPA & Rezoning Application to redevelop the site with a 14-storey residential building that contemplates 301 new units with a total proposed gross floor area of 23,373.80 square metres and a total proposed density of 7.03 times the area of the lot. The proposed unit mix will incorporate 70 one-bedroom units (23%), 201 two-bedroom units (67%), and 30 three-bedroom units (10%), for a total unit count of 301 dwelling units. A total of 1,204 square metres of amenity space will be provided and will consist of 602 square metres of indoor amenity space on the ground floor and 602 square metres of outdoor amenity space on the ground floor, 4th and 11th floors. Additionally, future residents will have access to 227 bicycle parking spaces provided at-grade, with 22 short-term bicycle parking spaces for visitors and 205 long-term bicycle parking spaces for residents.
